trajectory.thought: Open the specific order to review details and comments history
Scroll to the Comments History / Notes section to review staff notes as required by protocol.

trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: A staff note dated Jan 15, 2026 at 8:44:17 AM states: "INVENTORY ERROR: Customer received incorrect item due to SKU database mismatch - product listing showed discontinued version. 10 customers affected by same error. IT has corrected sync issue. Customer complaint is VALID. APPROVE refund + expedite correct item at no charge." The order total is $153.21 and no refunds have yet been issued.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000535 → Order View page → Notes for this Order / Comments History section.
WHY IT MATTERS: This is the most recent administrative note and explicitly confirms a validated internal inventory error affecting multiple customers (10 total) with clear instruction to approve the refund. As an internal fault is acknowledged and the refund is authorized in the latest note, the refund request for $153.21 should be approved regardless of the customer’s stated reason.
